evals.prompt: Save my progress. I just finished implementing the basic squash logic in src/commands/squash.go — the tests pass and it works. Next I'll start on the interactive TUI mode.
evals.expected_output: task.md updated: 'Implement basic squash logic' marked ✅, next subtask 'Add interactive mode' marked 🔄. current.md refreshed with new Current SubTask and Next Step. decision.md unchanged. Output shows clear before/after summary.

setup.description: Mid-Phase 2 project with one subtask 🔄 (basic squash logic). Git shows changes to squash.go. User completed the subtask.

evals.prompt: Checkpoint. We got a lot done this session: the squash command is fully working including interactive mode, I wrote all the unit tests, and we made a decision to switch from bubbletea to huh for the TUI library. Also, the cleanup command is blocked because we need the new git permissions API first.
evals.expected_output: Multiple task.md updates: squash subtasks → ✅, interactive mode → ✅, unit tests → ✅. Cleanup command marked ⏸️ with reason. decision.md appended with new Decision 4 (huh over bubbletea). current.md refreshed — Next SubTask advances, Current Blocker set for cleanup. Design/plan confirmation prompt shown.

setup.description: Active Phase 2 with squash command in progress. Git shows multiple file changes. Session produced multiple completions, a new decision, and a blocker.

evals.expected_output: No changes detected. Git shows no meaningful diff, conversation has no task completions. Agent reports 'No changes detected. The project state appears to already be up to date.'

setup.description: Project state already up to date. current.md and task.md are consistent. Git working tree is clean.
